◎简　　介  

　　In communist Romania, thousands of Western films on bootleg VHS tapes — mostly Hollywood action movies — were smuggled behind the Iron Curtain, opening a window into the free world.Under President Nicolae Ceaușescu, Romania was culturally isolated and ideologically censored.
